strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ year requirement
Current hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq matches a key requirement
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, Selenium course, Fluent-Asserts library)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the primary stack
React exposure appears limited to one role; frontend stack leans heavily on Ember.js
Significant time invested in DLang, which is not part of the target stack
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js, MongoDB, AWS, and Docker experience, plus current AI agent and MCP infrastructure work that strongly aligns with the role. Frontend depth in React is lighter than ideal and Nest.js/Vitest aren't called out explicitly, but the breadth, craftsmanship focus, and exact-fit AI tooling experience make this a strong interview candidate.
